title: Refactor CopilotKit driver onto shared foundation
objective: Move the existing CopilotKit pilot to the shared UI runtime and protocol foundation without changing the user-visible pilot behavior.
non_goals: Do not enable CopilotKit by default.
Do not introduce Copilot Cloud persistence.
Do not expand frontend tools beyond safe UI commands.
acceptance_checks: Copilot Runtime health and info routes still pass.
CopilotKit e2e still covers config, runtime bridge and AG-UI request.
Operations docs mention the new driver setting.
